economic_notes: Band owns and operates multiple business enterprises including Ainsworth Hot Springs, Lower Kootenay Development LP, Morris Flowers Inc., and yaqan nukiy Farms LP. Also holds cost-basis investments in All Nations Trust Company, SEM Holdings, SEM Resort, BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, and Ktunaxa Holdings LP.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-compliance with PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations — management has not completed assessment of tangible capital assets for potential AROs; impact is unquantified. Population stated as 'over 200 members'. One fully consolidated subsidiary: Lower Kootenay Guide Outfitters Ltd. Seven GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Large 'Other income' of $25.8M in 2024 vs $14.6M in 2023 drives significant surplus increase — source not fully detailed but includes large Administration segment other income of $22.8M, possibly including Impact Management and Benefits Agreement funding. Internally restricted reserves of $2,492,500 related to Impact Management and Benefits Agreement. No schedule of remuneration provided.
